quality.completeness: High. All key mechanics and flavor text are present.
quality.clarity: Good. Mechanics are clearly defined (extra damage, resistance, light, extinguishing flames).

active_abilities.name: Extinguish Flames
active_abilities.effect: Extinguish all nonmagical flames within 30 feet when drawn.

situational_properties: Sheds bright light (10ft) and dim light (additional 10ft) in freezing temperatures.

analysis.notes: The item description is mechanically sound and consistent with standard D&D 5e magic item formatting. The combination of cold damage, fire resistance, and environmental interaction makes it a well-defined Very Rare item.
